title: birchwood_274 client-sent-export-failure
summary: Merged into 260515-birchwood_274-salesforce-audience-export-error: Client-sent SignalRoute 723 alert is the notification counterpart of the Birchwood Salesforce Audience export failure: same incident, org 274, audience/signal 723, and preflight selected the same salesforce_audience_object endpoint with failed exported rows.
